children.heading: Violation of this chapter treated as violation of other Acts
children.label: 1 Violation of this chapter treated as violation of other Acts
children.text: For purposes of the exercise by any agency referred to in subsection (a) of such agency’s powers under any Act referred to in such subsection, a violation of a requirement imposed under this chapter shall be deemed to be a violation of a requirement imposed under that Act.

children.heading: Enforcement authority under other Acts
children.label: 2 Enforcement authority under other Acts
children.text: In addition to the powers of any agency referred to in subsection (a) under any provision of law specifically referred to in such subsection, each such agency may exercise, for purposes of enforcing compliance with any requirement imposed under this chapter, any other authority conferred on such agency by law.

children.heading: Regulations by agencies other than the Bureau
children.label: c Regulations by agencies other than the Bureau
children.text: The authority of the Bureau to issue regulations under this chapter does not impair the authority of any other agency referred to in subsection (a) to make rules regarding its own procedures in enforcing compliance with the requirements imposed under this chapter.
